steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of withholding tax rate from 13.5% to 15% under FI-NO treaty for Nokia Oyj dividend
Submit refund application to Vero using Form 6163e/6167e (corporations) or 6164e (individuals) for EUR 3,607.50 overpayment
Provide custodian statement showing gross EUR 240,500 and tax EUR 32,467.50 as supporting documentation
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement provisions allowing streamlined processing between Finland and Norway

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
